name: Peanut Butter Fudge 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter and peanut butter in the top of a double boiler and melt.
2. Sift together confectioner's sugar and dry powdered milk; set aside.
3. Add corn syrup, water, and vanilla to the melted peanut butter mixture.
4. Stir in about half the dry ingredients, blend well, then add the remaining dry ingredients.
5. Blend until very smooth. Stir in chopped peanuts.
6. Turn the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
7. Cut into squares.
